description_long: This hammock features a wide, rectangular bed made from striped fabric in shades of blue and gray, supported at each end by dark wooden spreader bars. The fabric is tightly woven and appears to be both durable and comfortable, with a matching pillow attached at one end for added head support. Numerous white suspension ropes radiate from the spreader bars, converging at metal rings for secure attachment to external supports. The overall design is open and inviting, with the spreader bars ensuring the hammock remains flat and easy to enter. The hammock is designed for outdoor use, suitable for parks, gardens, or urban relaxation areas. Its construction suggests a balance of comfort, stability, and aesthetic appeal.
description: A striped blue and gray hammock with wooden spreader bars, white suspension ropes, and an attached pillow, designed for outdoor relaxation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammock, the striped fabric, and both spreader bars with converging suspension ropes.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the hammock, the spreader bar, and the arrangement of suspension ropes converging at a central ring.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the pillow now visible at the far end of the hammock.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the pillow resting on the spreader bar and the converging suspension ropes.
